independent_tests.test_output_summary: Independent test verification skipped (tests not required for scaffolding tasks)

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Structured JSON logging active after `configure_logging()` call
criteria_verification.evidence: TestConfigureLoggingActivation verifies: root logger has exactly one handler with JsonFormatter after configure_logging(), previous handlers are replaced, and reconfiguration is idempotent. 4 tests cover this criterion.
criteria_verification.notes: TestConfigureLoggingActivation verifies: root logger has exactly one handler with JsonFormatter after configure_logging(), previous handlers are replaced, and reconfiguration is idempotent. 4 tests cover this criterion.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Log level set from config (BDD: "Structured logging is configured from the config file")
criteria_verification.evidence: TestLogLevelFromConfig parametrically verifies all 4 log levels (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR) are correctly set on the root logger from LoggingConfig.level. Additional tests verify DEBUG messages are emitted when level=DEBUG and INFO messages are suppressed when level=ERROR. 4 parametrised + 3 explicit = 7 tests.
criteria_verification.notes: TestLogLevelFromConfig parametrically verifies all 4 log levels (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR) are correctly set on the root logger from LoggingConfig.level. Additional tests verify DEBUG messages are emitted when level=DEBUG and INFO messages are suppressed when level=ERROR. 4 parametrised + 3 explicit = 7 tests.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: JSON format output on all log lines
criteria_verification.evidence: TestJsonFormatOutput verifies: every log line is valid JSON, contains 'level' and 'message' fields, extra fields are merged into top-level payload (matching API-entrypoint.md format), multiple log lines are each independently valid JSON, and all 4 log levels produce valid JSON. TestProgressLoggingFormat tests verify exact match with API-entrypoint.md examples (startup, progress, complete events). TestJsonFormatter unit tests verify single-line output and non-serialisable fallback. 13+ tests cover this criterion.
criteria_verification.notes: TestJsonFormatOutput verifies: every log line is valid JSON, contains 'level' and 'message' fields, extra fields are merged into top-level payload (matching API-entrypoint.md format), multiple log lines are each independently valid JSON, and all 4 log levels produce valid JSON. TestProgressLoggingFormat tests verify exact match with API-entrypoint.md examples (startup, progress, complete events). TestJsonFormatter unit tests verify single-line output and non-serialisable fallback. 13+ tests cover this criterion.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestStandardLoggingModuleIntegration verifies: configure_logging uses the root logger, child loggers inherit JSON format, the standard logging.getLogger(__name__) pattern works, and %-style string formatting in log messages produces correct JSON output. 4 tests cover this criterion.
criteria_verification.notes: TestStandardLoggingModuleIntegration verifies: configure_logging uses the root logger, child loggers inherit JSON format, the standard logging.getLogger(__name__) pattern works, and %-style string formatting in log messages produces correct JSON output. 4 tests cover this criterion.
